title: PARENTING WORKSHOPS - 211info
text: GRANTS PASS SCHOOL DISTRICT 7 PARENTING WORKSHOPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers evidence-based discipline strategies, teaches skills to help empower and encourage healthy parenting, also helps build a sense of community with other parents or guardians. Dinner and child care are provided. 725 North East Dean Drive Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Parents or guardians Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Community Meals Parenting Materials Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - READY FOR KINDERGARTEN PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - PARENT AND CHILD PLAYGROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
